# pangolin_sites (Data Source)

Retrieves the list of sites for the organization.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pangolin_sites" "all" {}

output "online_sites" {
  value = [for s in data.pangolin_sites.all.sites : s.name if s.online]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `sites` (Attributes List) List of sites. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sites))

<a id="nestedatt--sites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sites`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) The WireGuard address.
- `id` (Number) The numeric site ID.
- `name` (String) The site name.
- `nice_id` (String) The human-readable site ID.
- `online` (Boolean) Whether the site is online.
- `type` (String) The site type.
